steps.title: Emphasize both dates
steps.content: The task asks when Torres collected both samples. The relevant notes give two collection dates: Vernonia liatroides in February 1927 and Achyrocline vauthieriana in May 1930.

steps.title: Reject other emphases
steps.content: Choice A focuses on the online herbarium. Choice B gives only one specimen and one date. Choice C emphasizes family and location rather than timing. The sentence that compares both collection dates best fits the goal. The answer is D.
